description_long: This house features a tall, narrow central tower with a steeply pitched blue roof, flanked by a main structure with a matching blue gable roof. The exterior walls are a light gray, accented by brown trim around the windows and roof edges. The front facade includes a prominent bay window beneath a decorative circular motif, and a covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance. Windows are tall and arched, with yellow-tinted panes, arranged asymmetrically around the building. The rear and side elevations reveal additional windows and a secondary entrance, as well as a small overhang above the porch. The overall design suggests a whimsical, storybook architectural style with Victorian influences.
description: A whimsical house with a tall blue-roofed tower, bay window, and covered porch, featuring arched yellow windows and brown trim on light gray walls.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall central tower, bay window, decorative motif, and main entry porch with steps.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the covered porch, side windows, and the extension of the main roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a secondary entrance, fewer windows, and the continuation of the blue gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional arched windows and the rear portion of the house, with the tower's height prominent.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with arched and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with steps, decorative trim, and a prominent bay window beneath a circular motif.
